title: FPS Perfected Lite
description: This is a light version of the FPS Perfected modpack. Maximize your game's speed!
body:
# ⚡ FPS Perfected Lite  
_The ultimate lightweight modpack for buttery-smooth Minecraft performance._  

## 🪶 What is FPS Perfected Lite?  
FPS Perfected Lite is a **highly optimized Minecraft modpack** built for **maximum performance** on any system. It’s the **stripped-down, fine-tuned** version of the original FPS Perfected — designed to squeeze out every frame without losing that clean, modern look.  

## ⚡ Details 
✅ **Extreme FPS Boost** – Built from the ground up for speed 

✅ **Ultra Lightweight** – Only the essentials, almost no bloat     

✅ **Fully Compatible** – Works in multiplayer using the Essential mod (not included) 

## 🔧 Behind the Scenes  
FPS Perfected Lite uses a selection of **core optimization mods** that refine rendering, chunk loading, and memory usage — delivering smooth gameplay, even on older hardware.  

## 🎯 Made For  
🔹 Players running Minecraft on **low-end or older PCs**

🔹 **PvP and competitive** players who need the smoothest frames

🔹 Anyone who just wants Minecraft to run **like a feather**  

## ✨ Extra Touch  
FPS Perfected Lite includes Nices fast leaves from [VanillaTweaks](https://vanillatweaks.net/) — It's just so that the leaves look better when in fast mode.
